rules.name: Wisdom of the Shattered
rules.lore: The warriors of the Shattered Legions strive to emulate their King in all they do. Inspired by recorded accounts of His deeds in battle, they employ ever-shifting tactics to respond to threats and eliminate their enemies. Few can match their flexibility and adaptability in warfare.
rules.text: At the start of each Battle Round, select one of the three Tactics below. It is active for your whole army until the end of the Battle Round.

options.name: Unrelenting Aggression
options.text: Your +Shattered Legions+ units can Shoot after making an Advance move.

options.name: Feigned Retreat
options.text: Your +Shattered Legions+ units can Shoot and Charge after making a Fall Back move.

options.name: Unrelenting Aggression
options.text: Your +Shattered Legions+ units can Charge after making an Advance move.

strategems.name: Second Vow
strategems.when: At the start of the Battle Round
strategems.effect: Until the end of the Battle Round, if the enemy unit selected for "Vow of Eternity" is destroyed, the target unit immediately becomes selected for Vow of Eternity.

strategems.name: Inhuman Strategy
strategems.target: A "Wisdom of the Shattered" Tactic, other than the one chosen at the beginning of the Battle Round.
strategems.effect: Until the end of the Battle Round, the target Tactic is now active for your army, instead of any other Tactic.

strategems.name: Protection of the Shattered King
strategems.when: After an Activated enemy unit declares an attack
strategems.effect: Until the end of the Battle Round, attacks made against the target unit have their Armor Break worsened by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

upgrades.name: Scion of the Shattered
upgrades.text: At the start of the battle, gain 1 CP.

upgrades.name: Fervent Crusaders
upgrades.text: At the start of the battle, select a second Templar Vow. It applies only to your +Warlord+ (and their attached unit, if any). Your +Warlord+ may not be targed with the Fervent Acclamation strategem.
